title: ferray-io: parse numpy fixed-width string dtype descriptors (S20, U10, V8)
description: Follow-up split out from #490. Extend ferray-io/src/npy/dtype_parse.rs to recognize the S/U/V dtype descriptors (S20 = 20-byte ASCII, U10 = 40-byte UCS-4 unicode, V8 = 8-byte raw void). Currently these descriptors get rejected as 'unsupported'. ferray-core can hold them as Vec<u8>/Vec<u32>/Vec<u8> arrays via the bytes-element path.
